snippet.title: PRAVILA IGRE - JEDINA (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Pravila Igre - Jedina // Gema Produkcija 2021.
Zabranjeno kopiranje! Svaka neovlaإ،tena kopija bit ؤ‡e uklonjena!

Ivan Peneziؤ‡, pjevaؤچ grupe Pravila Igre, podijelio je sjeؤ‡anja na svoju najveؤ‡u i najvaإ¾niju ljubavnu priؤچu dosad. Vratio se na poؤچetak ljubavi sa Sarom Lizatoviؤ‡, samozatajnom djevojkom iz Zagreba, s kojom je dijelio ljubavne poؤچetke od malih nogu. Njihov se ljubavni roman proteإ¾e kroz ؤچitavu mladost, uz dobre i pokoji loإ، trenutak, ali proإ¾et brojnim osjeؤ‡ajima, rekao je Ivan. â€‍Kako se desi da ti vaإ¾no nije ono إ،to je sveto bilo nekad prijeâ€œ, prisjetio se u nastavku i ispriؤچao kako ga je, nakon zaruka na Valentinovo, njegova djevojka ostavila â€“ ni manje, ni viإ،e â€“ pred oltarom te tako ostavila gorak okus prisjeؤ‡anja na Dan zaljubljenih.

Upravo je ovo priؤچa koju nam je otpjevao za klavirom, u novome spotu grupe Pravila Igre za pjesmu Jedina. Pjesma koja svojom glazbom i tekstom budi posebne emocije te daje naslutiti da je rijeؤچ o novome hitu u ovo doba godine. Nakon viإ،estrukih glazbenih uspjeإ،nica, Pravila Igre ponovno povisuju ljestvicu te svojim novim glazbenim uratkom daju naslutiti da nas u 2021. godini oؤچekuje niz njihovih glazbenih iznenaؤ‘enja.

â€‍Teإ،ko je opisati koliko nam je svaka pjesma posebna dok je stvaramo, ali zaista je tako â€“ svaka od njih ostavlja svojevrsni upeؤچatljivi trag u naإ،oj karijeri. Pjesma 'Jedina' takoؤ‘er je meؤ‘u naإ،im omiljenim djelima, i ؤچvrsto vjerujemo da ؤ‡e pronaؤ‡i svoje mjesto u srcima naإ،ih sluإ،atelja. Ona je posebna, emotivna, karakterna, i upravo to smo nastojali potkrijepiti priؤچom u glazbenom video spotu. Nadamo se da ؤ‡ete uإ¾ivati kao إ،to smo i mi uإ¾ivali stvarajuؤ‡i ju!â€œ, izjavili su deؤچki iz Pravila Igre.

Pjesma Jedina zapoؤچinje niz od planirana 4 singla u ovoj godini, a deؤچki kaإ¾u kako ؤ‡e, u skladu s nadolazeؤ‡im okolnostima, spremno odraditi barem nekoliko (virtualnih) nastupa za svoje vjerne oboإ¾avatelje. Cjelokupnu podrإ،ku pruإ¾aju im i supruإ¾nici Buljan, autori i tzv. â€‍hitmejkeriâ€œ koji vjerno stoje iza svih njihovih glazbenih uspjeإ،nica.

snippet.title: Life found beneath Antarctic ice sheet 'shouldn't be there'
snippet.description:
Biologists say the inadvertent discovery of sea life on a boulder underneath an Antarctic ice shelf and hundreds of kilometres challenges our understanding of how far organisms can live from sunlight.

A British Antarctic Survey team drilled through the 900-metre-thick Filchner-Ronne Ice Shelf and dropped a camera down the hole in search of mud on the seabed. To their surprise, the camera revealed a boulder ringed by animals. Video footage appear to show 16 sponges, accompanied by 22 unidentified animals which could include barnacles. It is the first time such immobile life has been found beneath an Antarctic ice sheet.  â€œThereâ€™s all sorts of reasons they shouldnâ€™t be there,â€‌ says Huw Griffiths at the British Antarctic Survey, who analysed the footage.

Read more: https://www.newscientist.com/article/2267737-life-found-beneath-antarctic-ice-sheet-shouldnt-be-there/

Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Supermanâ€™s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Being a parent isnâ€™t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneâ€™s favorite activity, but it can be very messy â€” and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneâ€™s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonâ€™t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know.

You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonâ€™t take hours. snippet.title: Samohrani otac s troje djece إ¾ivi pod ploؤچom
snippet.description:
Veljko Pavloviؤ‡ iz Viteza otac troje malodobne djece إ¾ivi bez krova nad glavom. S troje malodobne djece إ¾ivi pod betonskom ploؤچom jer nije u moguؤ‡nosti da pokrije kuؤ‡u krovnom konstrukcijom. Supruga  ga je napustila i vratila se prvom ؤچovjeku u Kakanj. Ostavila troje malodobne djece o kojima brine Veljko. Veljko nema stalnog zaposlenja nego ide na dnevnicu kada ima posla. Kada nema ide u إ،umu skupljati drva da djeci osigura ogrjev. Veljko bi najviإ،e volio kada bi mogao staviti krov na kuؤ‡u kako bi zaإ،titio betonsku ploؤچu koja prokiإ،njava. Unutarnji zidovi kuؤ‡e koju je sam gradio nemaju uopؤ‡e إ¾buku pa puإ،e sa svih strana. Svi koji إ¾ele pomoؤ‡i Veljka mogu donacije izvrإ،iti putem Western union banke na adresu: Veljko Pavloviؤ‡, Sofa b.b.  72250 Vitez, BiH, mobitel: 060 32 32 671
Pridruإ¾ite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

MARKO إ KUGOR - KAP VODE

Glazba: Marko Tomasoviؤ‡
Tekst: Josip Ralaإ،iؤ‡
Aranإ¾man: Leo إ karo
Izdavaؤچ: Zvuci Mediterana

VIDEO PRODUKCIJA: Zupanؤچiؤچ DESIGN Video

"KAP VODE"

Noؤ‡as duإ،u pred svima otvaram,
i cijelog sebe zauvijek tebi poklanjam.
Ovaj ples neka traje zauvijek,
tvoja je ljubav nemiru mom lijek.

Ref.
Moja si mirna luka na ovom moru nemira,   
A tvoja njeإ¾na ruka mom je srcu postelja.   
I na kraj svijeta, ako treba, ja sam spreman za tebe,
tvoja ljubav kap je vode usred pustinje.

Noؤ‡as si lijepa, najljepإ،a od svih,
i sve rijeؤچi svijeta sad stanu mi u stih.
Al dovoljan je samo jedan pogled tih,
naإ،a ljubav nije od obiؤچnih.

Zagrli me ؤچvrsto, nikad ne puإ،taj,
sve dok diإ،em, dok mi sviؤ‡e,
ova ljubav nema kraj. 

Kopiranje je zabranjeno, svaku neovlaإ،tenu kopiju bit ؤ‡emo primorani ukloniti!

آ© Zvuci Mediterana, 2021.

snippet.title: Kuؤ‡a od srca S07, porodica Stanؤچulj 04. PINK 21.02. 12h premijerna epizoda porodice Maؤچak 01
snippet.description: Projekat "Kuؤ‡a od srca" ima za cilj zbrinjavanje najugroإ¾enijih porodica na teritoriji Republike Srbije. Ministarstvo rada i socijalne politike prepoznalo je zajedniؤچke ciljeve i prikljuؤچilo se projektu â€‌ Kuؤ‡a od srca â€‌ u pomoؤ‡i pri zadovoljavanju osnovnih potreba ugroإ¾enih porodica. Porodice koje su deo projekta â€‌ Kuؤ‡a od srca â€‌ uz podrإ،ku Ministarstva rada i socijalne politike imaju priliku da budu stambeno zbrinute, materijalno potpomognute, vraؤ‡ene u obrazovni sistem إ،to rezultira resocijalizacijom svih ؤچlanova porodice uz akcentovanje na najmlaؤ‘e ؤچlanove druإ،tva. Osnovna ideja projekta â€‌ Kuؤ‡a od srca â€‌ jeste ukljuؤچivanje celokupne zajednice u pomoؤ‡ porodicama koje su od strane Ministarstva proglaإ،ene najugroإ¾enijim. Ono إ،to izdvaja serijal â€œKuؤ‡a od srcaâ€‌, jeste ؤچinjenica da je to prvi domaؤ‡i rijaliti, koji se pored reإ،avanja stambenog pitanja kroz graؤ‘evinske radove, bavi i reإ،avanjem porodiؤچnih i meؤ‘uljudskih odnosa. Pravila serijala su jasno definisana i glase: 1. Izgradnja kuؤ‡e po projektu traje 31dan i ukoliko nije gotova serijal tu zavrإ،ava, objekat ostaje u zateؤچenom stanju, sa porukom da se zajedniica ukljuؤچi I pomogne u zavrإ،etku radova. 2. Da imaju imovinu najbliإ¾ih koji su spremni da je ustupe za izgradnju Kuؤ‡e od srca . 3. Najbliإ¾i ؤچlanovi porodice, prijatelji I komإ،ije moraju imati pozitivno miإ،ljenje o izabranoj porodici. 4. Punoletni ؤچlanovi izabrane porodice moraju biti druإ،tveno odgovorni : da nisu uإ¾ivaoci alkohala, droge kao I da nisu skloni nasilju, a imaju izraإ¾enu crtu o brizi za decu. Ukoliko bilo koji ؤچlan porodice koji je uؤچesnik serijala prekrإ،i bilo koje pravilo, serijal se prekida istog trenutka kao I sama gradnja.

snippet.title: House impeachment managers show security video from inside the Capitol
snippet.description:
On the second day of the Senate impeachment trial, House impeachment manager Stacey Plaskett showed newly-released security footage from inside the Capitol as the mob of Trump supporters stormed the building on January 6 and officials including Vice President Mike Pence were hurriedly evacuated. CAUTION: This video includes explicit language and violence.

de.title: Salat mit Paradiesgeschmack
de.description:
Der SEVENTH HEAVEN-Salat ist einer meiner Lieblingsnudelsalate. Es besteht aus viel Gemأ¼se und Joghurt verleiht ihm einen wunderbaren erfrischenden Geschmack. Dieser Salat mit Nudeln wird sehr schnell und einfach zubereitet und eignet sich hervorragend als Beilage zum Hauptgericht und als Salatmahlzeit.
ZUTATEN
400 g Pasta Mattini
1 Kopf lila Zwiebel (kann auch schwarz sein)
1-2 Knoblauchzehen
1 Karotte
3-4 Gurken
eine Tasse Zuckermais
1 Tasse Joghurt von 180 gr
so
150-200 g Feta
2 gekochte Eier
zuerst
sأ¼أںer wأ¼rziger Pfeffer
#salad #recipes

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
Weâ€™ve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and hereâ€™s what we created. Arenâ€™t 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, letâ€™s try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts youâ€™ll adore.

Itâ€™s time for an almighty USA vs Germany drag race! 

Matâ€™s in the absolutely huge Dodge Challenge Demon, and heâ€™s lining up against Yianni in the Porsche 911 Turbo S! 

When you compare them on paper, it looks like the Dodge has it in the bag. With a humungous 6.2-litre supercharged V8 under its massive bonnet, the Challenge Demon can put down 808hp and 972Nm! As a result, it seemingly dwarfs the 911 Turbo S, which has a 3.8-litre twin-turbo flat-six, which can produce 650hp & 800Nm. 

But of course, this isnâ€™t the first time weâ€™ve driven a Porsche 911 Turbo S on this channel, and we know youâ€™re pretty much guaranteed a 1/4 mile time of less than 10.5 seconds! 

So how do you think this will play out? Will the Dodge be able to put its power down? Or is the Porsche set to grab another victory?

snippet.title: YouTubers have to declare ads. Why doesn't anyone else?
snippet.description:
Around the world, there are regulations for "influencers". Those regulations make sure that if someone is paid to endorse a product, they have to declare that payment to the people watching. But why does no-one on TV, or film, or anywhere else have to do that?

ًں‘¥ًں‘¥ CREDITS ًں‘¥ًں‘¥

Written and performed by TOM SCOTT https://www.tomscott.com/
Script assistant ANDREA MARKS
Animation BILLY CRINION https://twitter.com/BillyCrinion and WILLIAM MARLER https://wmad.co.uk
Dubbing mixer GRAHAM HAERTHER

"Does the Spearmint Lose Its Flavor on the Bedpost Overnight" by Rose/Broom/Breuer (1924), arranged for orchestra by BENJAMIN SQUIRES https://www.benjaminsquires.co.uk/

Thanks to EVAN EDINGER, JESSICA ENDOYAN, CHRISTINA HERNANDEZ, the TINY SPECK team, and SAM VALIANT

Filmed safely: https://www.tomscott.com/safe/

آ© Pad 26 Limited MMXXI

ًں“„ًں“„ SOURCES ًں“„ًں“„

ًں’µ PAYMENT AND CONTROL
Lonnie Donegan changing Spearmint: mentioned in a lot of places, but I can't find a contemporary account.
Ray Davies flying: https://twitter.com/thekinks/status/1265203792754212864 and https://www.cbc.ca/radio/undertheinfluence/why-ray-davies-flew-26-000-km-to-save-lola-1.5009086
BBC trademark policy: https://www.bbc.co.uk/programmes/articles/5R152hTbVPQdYjn29q5jt4/16-songs-banned-by-the-bbc
Pitbull and Kodak: https://twitter.com/pitbull/status/16567622829080576
Pitbull and Voli: https://voli305vodka.com/ "Owned and operated by Armando Christian Perez, aka Pitbull"
Gucci on Lil Pump: no quotes, but given the lyrics and video, it's safe to say they didn't have control
YMCA reaction: https://news.google.com/newspapers?nid=1346&dat=19790329&id=M3VRAAAAIBAJ&sjid=uPoDAAAAIBAJ&pg=7192,10172867

âœ”ï¸ڈ YOU HAVE TO DECLARE IT
US Code Title 15: https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/15
Nikkie de Jager, One Dip Makeup Challenge: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CA18hTShwpk
Disclosures 101 for Social Media Influencers [PDF]: https://www.ftc.gov/system/files/documents/plain-language/1001a-influencer-guide-508_1.pdf
An Influencerâ€™s Guide to making clear that ads are ads [PDF]: https://www.asa.org.uk/uploads/assets/uploaded/3af39c72-76e1-4a59-b2b47e81a034cd1d.pdf
The FTCâ€™s Endorsement Guides: What People Are Asking: https://www.ftc.gov/tips-advice/business-center/guidance/ftcs-endorsement-guides-what-people-are-asking
YouTube declaration: https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/154235

â‌Œ NO-ONE ELSE HAS TO DECLARE IT
McFlurry: https://adage.com/article/adages/30-rock-mcflurry-scene-paid-placement/134689
Snapple: https://www.reuters.com/article/us-30rock-idUSN2833828120071128
"Branded content pods": https://adage.com/article/media/snl-air-fewer-commercials-season/303697
Farrow and Ball: https://www.bournemouthecho.co.uk/news/18014632.saturday-night-live-sketch-features-farrow-ball/
Branson cameo: https://www.cinemablend.com/pop/Branson-s-Bond-Cameo-Was-Bought-1558.html
Superman's $40,000: https://www.latimes.com/archives/la-xpm-1989-03-08-ca-322-story.html
Bond placement: https://www.bbc.com/culture/article/20151001-does-bonds-product-placement-go-too-far
Lorraine Kelly's tax bill: https://www.theguardian.com/business/2019/mar/20/lorraine-kelly-theatrical-artist-tax-tribunal-judge-rules

ًںژ¢ WE'RE GOING TO DISNEY WORLD
"Moms' conference": https://www.5minutesformom.com/disneysmmoms/
SNT viewing figures: https://www.eveningexpress.co.uk/lifestyle/entertainment/saturday-night-takeaway-smashes-ratings-record-after-airing-without-audience/
"19 years in a row": https://www.chroniclelive.co.uk/news/tv/ant--dec-win-best-17648154
"Can't find any other example" of the castle being covered: https://www.disboards.com/threads/ant-and-dec-tv-show-live-from-magic-kingdom-in-april.3581535/
Ofcom on product placement in UK TV: https://www.ofcom.org.uk/tv-radio-and-on-demand/advice-for-consumers/television/product-placement-on-tv
"One article on a tabloid web site": https://www.thesun.co.uk/tvandshowbiz/10841854/ant-and-dec-trademark-name/

ًں‡؛ًں‡¸ THE LAND OF THE FREE ًں‡؛ًں‡¸
FCC, "The FCC and Freedom of Speech": https://www.fcc.gov/consumers/guides/fcc-and-freedom-speech
US Bill of Rights: https://www.archives.gov/founding-docs/bill-of-rights
First Amendment exceptions: fact-checked by legal experts, but best summarised on Wikipedia: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/First_Amendment_to_the_United_States_Constitution
Commercial speech: https://www.mtsu.edu/first-amendment/article/900/commercial-speech
Communications Act 2003: https://www.legislation.gov.uk/ukpga/2003/21/contents
Animal Defenders International v United Kingdom: https://hudoc.echr.coe.int/fre?i=001-119244
CMA, "Social media endorsements: being transparent with your followers": https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/social-media-endorsements-guide-for-influencers/
German product placement: https://www.grin.com/document/417399

ًں“• CHAPTERS ًں“•

00:58 1. Payment and Control
05:47 2. You Have To Declare It
09:17 3. No-One Else Has To Declare It
18:03 4. We're Going To Disney World
24:47 5. The Land Of The Free
31:15 Outro

snippet.description:
I can't believe we spent 100 hours customizing the world's largest Playstation 5 and gave PS5's away to subscribers lol

Hope you enjoyed! Subscribe right now and you'll be a part of the giveaways! Thanks for watching :)

If you're not yet subscribed, I promise you won't regret subscribing! If you're already subscribed, I love you! â‌¤ï¸ڈ
Subscribe and you might be picked to be in my next video! It's free and it would genuinely make me super happy if you subscribed! ًں¥؛

Subscribe to all our channels!
ZHC Crafts: @ZHC Crafts 
ZHC Shorts: @ZHC Shorts 
MsMunchie: @MsMunchie

snippet.title: Peؤچeni krompir sa malo ulja lepإ،i od prإ¾enog. I hladan je ukusan, jedna tura  za celu porodicu.
snippet.description:
Recept za soؤچan peؤچeni krompir kojem neؤ‡ete odoleti. ؤŒak i kad odstoji i ohladi se bude odliؤچan. Bez dugog peckanja - jedna tura za celu porodicu. 
#krompir #bezprzenja #rucak
Recept na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/02/peceni-krompir-sa-malo-ulja-cak-i-lepsi.html

Koliؤچina koja je vama potrebna za ruؤچak.

Ovako sam ja.

Ogulila 2 kg. krompira, oprala, isekla, stavila da se kuva u vodi sa dve kaإ،iؤچice soli. Kada je skoro kuvan, ne sme da se raspada, ocedila vodu i preruؤچila u veliku tepsiju. snippet.title: Starship | SN9 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Tuesday, February 2, Starship serial number 9 (SN9) completed SpaceXâ€™s second high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 8 (SN8), SN9 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee â€“ approximately 10 kilometers in altitude. SN9 successfully performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.

The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starshipâ€™s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. During the landing flip maneuver, one of the Raptor engines did not relight and caused SN9 to land at high speed and experience a RUD.

These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

#30Day #Pushup #Challenge
200 push ups a day for 30 days, is it something you should do, does it actually work? And for who, only for beginners? Will it do nothing, or will it get you a lot stronger and build you massive muscles?

Well my brother did this 4 years ago, yes results, he was a starter back then and didnâ€™t really work out after that until last year where I challenged him to transform his body in 90 days, and he did, but now I want to challenge him to do this again and see what happens...

But, he is not the only one I am challenging. In this video you'll 3 guys with a ll a different level of experience do 200 pushups a day for 30 days. A beginner, an intermediate and a professional!

He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewâ€¦ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleâ€™s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher.

From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. snippet.title: RIJEKA vs HAJDUK 0:1 (5.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U Jadranskom derbiju, u zaostalom ogledu petog kola HT Prve lige, Hajduk je na Rujevici svladao Rijeku 1:0 golom Mije Caktaإ،a u 94. minuti.

Iako je Rijeka bila mnogo bolja od poؤچetka do kraja, ulaskom Caktaإ،a u drugom poluvremenu Spliؤ‡ani su postali neإ،to opasniji, a najbolji igraؤچ Hajduka je na kraju odluؤچio utakmicu i donio Hajduku vrlo vrijedne bodove.

U tvrdoj borbi bolje je dvoboj otvorio domaؤ‡in te je u 15. minuti Kulenoviؤ‡ naciljao suparniؤچki okvir vrata. Hajduk se sat vremena gotovo iskljuؤچivo branio, a Rijeka je periodiؤچno pritiskala suparnika, ali i propuإ،tala prilike.

U nastavku je pojaؤچana agresivnost Rijeke. Paviؤچiؤ‡ i Mudraإ¾ija su prijetili, a najbolju je إ،ansu u 83. minuti propustio Andrijaإ،eviؤ‡. I nakon svega uslijedio je pogodak, ali na drugoj strani, a Caktaإ، je po tko zna koji put golom spasio Spliؤ‡ane.

Rijeka i dalje ima prednost u odnosu na Hajduk (ؤچetiri boda), ali i dvije odigrane utakmice manje.

HT Prva liga, zaostala utakmica 5. kola: Rijeka - Hajduk 0:1 (Caktaإ، 90.+4)

snippet.title: DINAMO vs OSIJEK 1:0 (21.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U ogledu Dinama i Osijeka, dvije vodeؤ‡e momؤچadi na ljestvici HT Prve lige, slavio je domaؤ‡in. Aktualni prvak Dinamo pobijedio je 1:0.

Dinamo je agresivnije i odluؤچnije otvorio utakmicu te je poveo veؤ‡ u 15. minuti kada je pogrijeإ،io Silva, a poklon iskoristio strijelac Mislav Orإ،iؤ‡. Na kraju se ispostavilo kako je veؤ‡ tada postignut pogodak odluke.

Dominirao je Dinamo i u nastavku prvog poluvremena te je mogao barem joإ، dvije akcije pretvoriti u pogodak إ،to bi mu donijelo daleko ugodniji nastavak utakmice. Odmah na startu drugog poluvremena dogodila se nova odliؤچna prilika Dinama. No, u toj 47. minuti Ivanuإ،ec je pogodio vratnicu.

U drugom dijelu Osijek se napokon oslobodio pritiska Dinama i zaigrao otvorenije. Boؤچkaj i Lonؤچar su imali dobre إ،anse za izjednaؤچenje, a situacija je za Dinamo postala dodatno opasnija od 77. minute kada je drugi إ¾uti (iskljuؤچujuؤ‡i) karton dobio Ristovski, novo pojaؤچanje koji je debitirao u ovom susretu.

No, unatoؤچ tome, kao i dugoj sudaؤچkoj nadoknadi, Dinamo je saؤچuvao minimalno vodstvo te je pobjegao slavonskom prvoligaإ،u na tri boda plusa.

HT Prva liga, 21. kolo: Dinamo - Osijek 1:0 (Orإ،iؤ‡ 15.)

snippet.title: Sanela kupila ovce, kombi, napravila إ،talu
snippet.description:
Prije gotovo mjesec dana objavili smo priؤچu o samohranoj majci koja motornom pilom ruإ،i إ،umu i zaraؤ‘uje novac za svoju djecu. Nije imala nikakvih redovnih primanja za إ¾ivot a troje djece إ،alje u إ،kolu. Naإ،a priؤچa dirnula je u srce mnoge ljude diljem svijeta pa su Saneli slali pomoؤ‡ koju je ona koristila za kupovinu ovaca, kombija pravljenje إ،tale. Njezin إ¾ivot promijenjen je u potpunosti ali na bolje. Pogledajte priؤچu.
Pridruإ¾ite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:

snippet.title: MIC-MC-GOD MODE (OFFICIAL AUDIO)
snippet.description:
MIC-MC : https://www.instagram.com/micmc_93/

TEKST:

Koliko svez brate
vi morate da vezbate
jer repovati ne znate
sve znate,face su vam bez brate
sta je to u trendingu mora da me zezate
predahnem 

Ne mogu vise da gledam ova sranja,dranja,pomilovanja
imam nocne more sanjam

celija mozdana mi manja kazu mi da sam bog
bolje bi bilo bogu da se klanjas 

ne mogu stati ja dok ne dodje do klanja
jebeno lud evo mentalnog mi stanja 
eto me svud samo ganjam
vidi mi trud vidi kralja 
hejtere udarim preko glave poput thorovoga malja 

brate udarim kako valja,neko mi tamo obraz kalja 
habada babada babada babada govore glupi ljudi puni znanja
koliko repera trebam da pokidam da bi razumeli da sam budala
voli me svaki blok kraj stek voli me svaka mahala 
reperi za mene su sala meni je mikrofon taj alat
bolje mi bezi bre pedala,hteo bi feat neka hvala  
ne mogu tik tok repere,hip hop trepere para
ne mogu da mi plate pa se zapale izgore ko cigara
stivena sigala glume ala nemaju signala 
ponela ih slava dali za to deo svog anala
u Srbiji sam tata,kralj bog,eminem pa alah 
tako govore ljudi za mene pa mi previsoka skala 
ovo je odvod,prati moj hod UFO moj brod
ljudi su govna neki su manji govnima su pod rod
ja sam pro pro nisam propo moj kod 
10 dina ovde sada uso sam u GOD MOde


Malo mi treba da napadnem likove
moji mi govore ne veruj nikome 
pojedem barove snerove bitove 
ne moze niko da ponovi i to me 
zele kopirati praviti hitove
da li je moguce neko da skine me 
picke mekane face im vilene
oni bi hteli dole da vide me 

ne mogu dole da budem ja gorim 
i gorivo tera me jako da lomi
i repere volim kad leze u komi
a lirika zube im polomi boli 
ti bogovi pitaju kako postojim
i rogovi rastu mi sebe se bojim
jebe se meni da pobede brojim
propali ovi tu reperi tvoji

Za 10 godina nisam postigo ono sto ti si 

zabole me ono sto mi visi 

razlika izmedju mene i tebe 
kad ja repovo sam ti si tati u testisu bio samo orhitis-guglaj

U prevodu bio si bol u mudima
svako se pita na sta tacno ja aludiram 
ovo skola je za sve a oni mi uzina 
radis playback to ti je kao sebi da aplaudiras 
boii

Vidim dredove te furas glumac
nisi lil pump mozda mala pumpica za kurac
dm rejpujes mi nisam do sad video te buraz 
ni spomenuo pa ne znam zasto se tu guras

hoces clout vidim da si nula 
jebo mir hocu rat evo kozna frula
posto vidim bas si zapeo da duvas 
takve jebem vec odavno nemoj tu da mi se kurvas

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong â€“ Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
آ 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, â€œGodzilla vs. Kong,â€‌ the next epic adventure in Legendaryâ€™s cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in â€œGodzilla vs. Kongâ€‌ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansâ€”instigated by unseen forcesâ€”is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsgأ¥rd (â€œBig Little Lies,â€‌ â€œThe Little Drummer Girlâ€‌), Millie Bobby Brown (â€œStranger Thingsâ€‌), Rebecca Hall (â€œChristine,â€‌ â€œProfessor Marston and the Wonder Womenâ€‌), Brian Tyree Henry (â€œJoker,â€‌ â€œSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verseâ€‌), Shun Oguri (â€œWeathering with Youâ€‌), Eiza Gonzأ،lez (â€œFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shawâ€‌), Julian Dennison (â€œDeadpool 2â€‌), with Kyle Chandler (â€œGodzilla: King of the Monstersâ€‌) and Demiأ،n Bichir (â€œThe Nun,â€‌ â€œThe Hateful Eightâ€‌).
Wingard (â€œThe Guest,â€‌ â€œYouâ€™re Nextâ€‌) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (â€œThor: Ragnarokâ€‌) and Max Borenstein (â€œGodzilla: King of the Monsters,â€‌ â€œKong: Skull Islandâ€‌), story by Terry Rossio (â€œPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Talesâ€‌) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (â€œGodzilla: King of the Monstersâ€‌), based on the character â€œGodzillaâ€‌ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorâ€™s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (â€œThe Mummy,â€‌ â€œWorld War Zâ€‌), production designers Owen Paterson (â€œJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,â€‌ â€œGodzillaâ€‌) and Thomas S. Hammock (â€œBlair Witchâ€‌), editor Josh Schaeffer (â€œGodzilla: King of the Monstersâ€‌), costume designer Ann Foley (â€œSkyscraperâ€‌) and visual effects supervisor John â€œDJâ€‌ DesJardin (upcoming â€œZack Snyderâ€™s Justice Leagueâ€‌).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, â€œGodzilla vs. Kong.â€‌  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

Which, you know, is good to find out given the terror they've been puting generations of kids through. it.description:
Deliziosi dolci di carnevale, pronti in pochi minuti! Dolci di carnevale facili e veloci!
Castagnole facili e veloci. Castagnole allo yogurt velocissime.

250 g farina (2 tazze)

1 limone grattugiato

olio vegetale
zucchero per guarnire

250 g yogurt (1 cup)
150 ml milk (3/5 cup)
1 egg
1 grated lemon
70 g sugar (1/3 cup)
10 g baking powder (1 tablespoon)
vegetable oil
sugar to garnish

snippet.title: Bosanac kupio pravi vlak u voznom stanju
snippet.description:
Mladen Cvitanoviؤ‡ iz Golubinja kod إ½epؤچa svjetski je putnik. Bio je najmlaؤ‘i vojnik Vijetnamskog rata, radio na naftnim platformama, boksao u Norveإ،koj i pobijedio 94 puta. Doإ¾ivio je desetak poraza. Njegov djed je bio إ¾eljezniؤچar i u spomen na njega kupio je prvo parnu lokomotivu iz إ½eljezare Zenica u ispravnom stanju a onda i dva vagona od hrvatskih إ¾eljeznica. Mladen svako jutro trؤچi osam kilometara. Ima svoju teretanu gdje vjeإ¾ba a proizvodi i domaؤ‡a jaja koja prodaje trgovinama i seljacima koji ne إ¾ele uzgajati koke. Mladenova namjera je obnoviti Titov plavi voz koji ؤ‡e biti turistiؤچka atrakcija u Centralnoj Bosni, odnosno BiH. Zavrإ،io je i projekt إ¾eljezniؤچke stanice a od jeseni za turiste ؤ‡e biti na raspolaganju i jedan helikopter za obilazak poznatih turistiؤچkih destinacija. Mladen je u vojsci vozio ne samo helikoptere nego i avione. Svjetski putnik iz إ½epؤچa ima oko 65 godina ali i toliko ideja kao da mu je 35 godina. Pogledajte ovu neobiؤچnu priؤچu iz Golubinje kod إ½epؤچa.

snippet.title: Is the Xiaomi Mi 11 Pretending? - Durability Test!
snippet.description:
Its time to durability test the new Xiaomi Mi 11. A non professional phone with a whole lot of professional parts. At 600 bucks, though its definitely worth taking a look at. Today we are going to durability test the new  Mi 11. We'll see what the Mi 11 is made of, as well as see how structurally sound the frame is under pressure.

snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherâ€™s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewâ€¦ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleâ€™s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
